tasks.label: create-folder-structure
args: New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path 'docs/user stories/Architecture','docs/user stories/Backend','docs/user stories/UI','docs/user stories/Integration','docs/user stories/DevOps','docs/user stories/Infrastructure','docs/user stories/Security','docs/user stories/Documentation' -Force | Out-Null

tasks.label: move-stories-1
